analysis: The project has multiple HTML/CSS/JS files across different directories (test-website, github-page, docs). The event.json specifies a black hole theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing to-dos show incomplete CSS styling for a cosmic/dark theme with animations. The main focus should be on enhancing the black hole theme with proper animations, cosmic visuals, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for black hole visuals including swirling effects, glowing elements, and cosmic particle animations using @keyframes and transform properties.
Add animated slide sections with black hole content, interactive planet elements, and cosmic background patterns using SVG or CSS gradients.
Implement JavaScript functions to control animated slides, toggle black hole effects, and add interactive hover states for cosmic elements.
Apply the same black hole theme and animations to the GitHub Pages version for consistency across platforms.
Enhance the documentation page with black hole-themed animations and cosmic visual effects to match the main site.
